# ttd entry

List and edit logged time entries. See the [Managing entries guide](../../guides/managing-entries.md).

```console
ttd entry COMMAND
```

List and edit time entries.

**Commands**:

* [`edit`](#entry-edit): Edit an entry (refuses if it's on an invoice).
* [`list`](#entry-list): List entries, newest day last.
* [`rm`](#entry-rm): Delete an entry (refuses if it's on an invoice).

## entry list

```console
ttd entry list [OPTIONS]
```

List entries, newest day last.

**Parameters**:

* `--project, -p`:
* `--client`:
* `--from`:
* `--to`:
* `--week, --no-week`: This week  *\[default: False\]*
* `--month, --no-month`: This month  *\[default: False\]*
* `--json, --no-json`:   *\[default: False\]*

## entry edit

```console
ttd entry edit [OPTIONS] UID
```

Edit an entry (refuses if it's on an invoice).

**Parameters**:

* `UID, --uid`: Entry id (prefix ok, from `ttd entry list`)  **\[required\]**
* `--time`: New time, e.g. "9-11:30"
* `--note, -n`:
* `--tags`:
* `--project, -p`:
* `--client`:
* `--billable, --no-billable`:

## entry rm

```console
ttd entry rm UID
```

Delete an entry (refuses if it's on an invoice).

**Parameters**:

* `UID, --uid`:   **\[required\]**
